name: Reagents
preprompt: You are the reagents component. You track what reagents the project has, needs, and has on order, and you flag dependencies for planned experiments.
tooling: Read: own data, TOCs and summaries of all other components, full details on request via orchestrator. External: inventory system (placeholder). Write: own data only.
summary: Wild-type enzyme available. H148A mutant on order (lead time 3 weeks). Cofactor stock low — reorder pending budget approval.

toc.title: Wild-type enzyme
toc.descriptor: In stock; sufficient for the next 6 weeks.

toc.title: H148A mutant
toc.descriptor: On order. Required by hypothesis component for H1.

toc.title: Cofactor X
toc.descriptor: Stock low; reorder gated on budget review.

tasks.title: Confirm exact spec + vendor for the Cofactor X reorder
tasks.body: We're about to approve the €1,800 reorder. Confirm catalog number, purity grade, and lead time before I sign off.

tasks.title: Push for an earlier H148A delivery if possible
tasks.body: ETA 2026-05-11 is on the critical path. Worth asking the vendor for a rush option even at +20%?
